items: Added compare history snapshots over time for friend-profile tracking.
Added challenge-board export tools for CSV, JSON, and share-card output.
Added richer admin tools including override export, override import, and metadata-cache refresh controls.
Added drag-and-drop goal ordering persistence and improved queue interactions.
Added profile, goal, leaderboard, and challenge-board share-card downloads.
Added a new unlock trend chart and expanded the compare and goals modules.
Adjusted loaded-profile panel spacing so the completion bar sits more comfortably above the smaller tiles.
Improved active button visibility across module tabs, filters, and selectors.
Fixed stat-card spacing in module headers such as Selected role / Locked pool / Unlocked / Total adepts.
Changed private-profile errors to explain that the profile is not public and how to make Steam profile/game details public.
Polished the compare module with summary stats, completion bars, and one-click load actions.
Added a smarter grind recommendation card in Goals with focus and recommendation-style controls.
Improved Insights with an additional rarity breakdown chart.
Added dedicated custom fallback portraits for missing custom characters such as First and Slasher.
Fixed the giant empty hero area on first load by removing the forced full-page stretch behavior.
Made the main page scrollable again when needed while keeping large internal scrolling areas inside modules.
Increased module height so the main browser, adept browser, goals, compare, and insights panels feel much larger and more usable.
Kept the custom internal scrollbars for tables, panels, modals, and grouped views.
Improved the overall dashboard balance so the footer remains reachable without scrolling through the full achievement list.
Added a .gitattributes file to normalize line endings across Windows and Render/Linux environments.
Set most source files to LF while keeping Windows batch files on CRLF checkout behavior.
Reduced the chance of noisy Git diffs caused only by line-ending conversion.
Changed the desktop layout so the main page itself no longer needs long scrolling; each module now scrolls internally.
Added styled custom scrollbars to module lists, tables, modals, and panels.
Replaced most generated portraits with real local killer and survivor portrait assets pulled from the provided wiki lists, with fallbacks for the remaining characters.
Added a custom theme selector with multiple visual themes.
Added a pinned goals / challenge queue module.
Added a compare / leaderboard module for friends' public profiles.
Added an insights module with a role chart, unlock heatmap, and chapter grouping view.
Kept admin tools, force refresh, export tools, adept modules, and optional password-protected private mode.
Added Admin Tools with cache controls and a manual achievement override editor.
Added an optional admin-tools toggle for hosted deployments.
Added a force refresh Steam button to the main header for easier cache bypassing.
Added an About / Changelog modal and site mode display.
Added optional password-protected private mode with login/logout flow.
Kept export tools, release/chapter sorting, adept modules, and hosted multi-user support.
Added a force refresh button to bypass cache and pull fresh Steam data on demand.
Added an About / Changelog modal inside the app.
Added optional password protection for hosted deployments using environment variables.
Removed saved-profile storage and related web-only persistence.
Added visible versioning in the footer using the new DBD-Achi-Tracker naming scheme.
Added the first footer-based version display.
Removed saved profile autofill behavior from the app.
Kept the hosted multi-user friendly setup on Render with Waitress.
